data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. TYPHOON SASKIA is in top form, scoring by 4.5 lengths (19.92) over 366m at this track and making it back to back wins. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Can continue the winning form. 2. MILCHICK missed the frame two back but wound up strongly last time, finishing on late when third (25.93) in a Restricted WIN at Q Lakeside. Solid record here at the distance winning three races. Can feature again. 7. ZIPPING KIMELI is a promising dog in the frame at four of 10 starts including three wins and was in the minors again latest (29.99) over 520m at Q Parklands. Tends to go well on this box draw. Has the ability and rates a key chance this line-up. 8. FRAGILE FRANKIE will be hard to beat with a drop in trip.","runners":[1,2,7,8],"exclusive":false}
